components.examPathwayHub.studyModes.pra: Adaptive sessions for {{pathwayLine}}: one question at a time, with timing and reports tied back into lessons and the question bank.
Timed sessions and full-length review in the app
components.examPathwayHub.studyModes.sub: Same exam track for every option below. Pick one path or rotate through all three.
components.examPathwayHub.pnMarketingHub: Anchor scope in lessons, drill prioritization and medications, then let adaptive CAT, weak-area decks, and practice exams redirect what you repeat next.
Practical nursing focus for this pathway
Rehearse Next Generation item families inside your pathway filters — build stamina for multi-step reasoning without mixing in RN-only scope.
Who you see first, what can wait, and when to escalate — language matched to practical-nursing scope and exam-style judgement stems.
Connect assessment cues, documentation habits, and safety checks so what you practice in lessons maps to how you will think on test day.
Stabilize assessment, safety, and communication habits in PN/RPN-scoped teaching — then carry cues into items.
Open mixed case formats in-app (matrix, bow-tie, trend, multi-select) for cognitive rehearsal — not a regulator examination copy.
Short sets for prioritization, delegation within scope, pharmacology, and acute changes — rationales stay pathway-tagged.
components.examPathwayHub.premiumModules: Use in-app performance analytics and My Exam Plan to keep pacing honest — weak signals from questions and flashcards feed what you queue next.

Lessons, flashcards, practice exams, CAT intros, labs, medication math, pharmacology, NGN-style mixed drills, weak-area remediation, clinical scenarios, and OSCE-style skills when enabled — all pathway-scoped for LPN, LVN, or Canadian RPN candidates.
Clinical drills and interpretation modules scoped to your pathway—labs, medication math, pharmacology practice, and specialty simulations when enabled for your region.
Allied pathway–scoped labs, medication math, pharmacology drills, flashcards, and OSCE prep—aligned to your occupation lane when you sign in from an occupation hub.
A focused adaptive-length run scoped to your allied pathway pool—practice stamina, see performance signals, and reinforce high-yield topics before exam day.
Branching case practice scoped to your allied occupation—prioritization, safety, and judgment without nursing-licensure-only framing.
Use practice questions while scenarios roll out
Exam snapshots, salary context, and study articles published for your allied track—public resources on the marketing blog.
Track performance, forecast readiness, and keep exam pacing grounded in your study history.
First-year practice focus—roadmaps, judgment drills, and medication safety refreshers scoped to this pathway.
Free interactive modules on the Pre-Nursing hub, plus subscriber drills—labs, medication math, flashcards, timed sets, and adaptive sessions scoped to your pathway.
Track streaks in the app, set milestones for prerequisites or NCLEX goals, and keep pacing grounded in your progress data.
Browse every free foundations module—structured sequences with checkpoints before nursing school.
Body organization through organ systems—directional language, tissues, and integration you will reuse in clinical courses.
Structures, transport, energy pathways, and signaling basics that underpin physiology and pharmacology.
Organism categories, colonization vs infection, and infection-control reasoning that carries into patient safety.
Bonds, solutions, acids/bases, and clinical chemistry intuition before dosage and fluid reasoning accelerate.
Roots, prefixes, suffixes, and documentation habits so new vocabulary sticks faster.
Evidence-backed routines—spacing, retrieval, and exam pacing—to protect stamina during prerequisites.
Diagnostics literacy—what tests signal, how sensitivity/specificity shape decisions, and how to reason before interventions.
Isolation cues, PPE sequences, hand hygiene moments, and prevention mindset required on every clinical floor.
Therapeutic dialogue, SBAR-style updates, and accountable professionalism before simulation and clinical rotations.
Head-to-toe thinking—vitals, inspection cues, and structured assessment language you will reuse in lab.
Legal/ethical guardrails, scope awareness, and documentation habits that surface on applications and interviews.
Set milestones, capture prerequisites, and queue next steps—same planner learners use from the free Pre-Nursing hub.
Pathway-scoped practice items with rationales—use filters to attack weak topics before exams.
Short free adaptive session on the Pre-Nursing hub—ideal warm-up before longer subscriber runs.
Adaptive-length session tuned for Pre-Nursing pools—practice stamina with performance feedback when you are signed in.
A focused adaptive-length run scoped to your new graduate pathway—practice stamina, see weak signals, and build first-year floor confidence.
Performance snapshots and exam pacing stay scoped to your allied pathway—use Progress and My Exam Plan after sign-in.
Interpret panels with pathway-aware drills—electrolytes, renal/hepatic markers, and trend judgement.
High-stakes dosing and infusion calculations with strict validation—built for exam pacing.
Jump into pharmacology-focused question runs tied to your pathway scope.
Topic-organized decks for fast recall—pair with lessons and the question bank for weak areas.
Timed, exam-style attempts with performance summaries—calibrate stamina before test day.
Structured lessons scoped to this track—priorities, safety rules, and exam-shaped framing matched to how this pathway tests.
How adaptive CAT pacing works on this pathway before you jump into timed full-length attempts in-app.
Branching bedside-style cases inside the learner app—released when scenarios are publicly enabled for your cohort.
Question lanes that stress who you see first, what can safely wait, and how to escalate—built for chaotic first-shift reality.
Case-style and Next Generation formats in pathway-scoped runs—practice prioritization, delegation cues, and safety reasoning.
After sign-in, open weak-area flashcard drills tied to your performance so you reinforce shaky topics faster.
Medication administration drills and safety checks to rebuild muscle memory after clinical gaps.
Pathway-scoped medication administration drills where they fit your scope—pair with lessons for hybrid allied roles.
Foundational rhythm recognition through guided lessons and quizzes integrated with NurseNest modules.
Branching NP-style cases for judgement under uncertainty—sign in when scenarios are enabled for your cohort.
Structured communication and procedural checkpoints mapped to nursing OSCE-style practice.
Structured checkpoints for communication, safety, and procedural judgment—aligned to allied health OSCE-style expectations when enabled.
Accuracy trends, session history, and export-friendly summaries for your pathway.
Personalized pacing, milestones, and readiness forecasting tied to your goal date.
First-year RN scenarios—prioritization, delegation, communication, and shift management.
Exam-style items reinforcing prioritization and safety judgement for new graduate practice.

components.homeBottomSections.readinessE: Twenty-five items with an instant breakdown: see whether timing, knowledge, or judgement slipped before you sit for real.
components.homeBottomSections.reportCard: Category accuracy and trends over time—so you stop re-drilling chapters you already own and focus where score variance is highest.
components.homeBottomSections.studyPlann: Queue blocks from your exam date and the categories that still miss—so after a shift you open the planner and see what to do next, not a blank calendar.
components.homeBottomSections.studyTools: Reports, practice exams, and planners in one learner shell
After a shift, you should not rebuild a study stack from memory. Open the planner for your exam window, run a practice exam when you are ready, and read the report card to see what to queue next.
components.homeConversionSections.compet: Smaller banks, often under a few thousand items
Flashcards sold separately or missing entirely
Dedicated RPN, RN, NP, and allied tracks with correct scope language
Single-exam focus or mixed stems that blur delegation rules
Questions, decks, practice exams, and lessons referencing the same miss patterns
RT, lab, paramedic, imaging, and related tracks with protocol-level framing
Nursing-only content with no credible allied expansion
Category accuracy and session trends that suggest what to queue next
Score-only dashboards with no line-of-sight to the next study block
Most tools optimize for one test. NurseNest keeps questions, decks, practice exams, lessons, and category analytics on one rail so you are not rebuilding a workflow every semester.
components.homeConversionSections.conver: Create a free account — explore the bank
What you actually get in the shell

Fewer open tabs. NurseNest combines {{questions}} exam-style items, {{flashcards}} flashcards across {{decks}} decks, CAT-style practice exams, image-backed items where available, and rationales that spell out safe vs unsafe options—in one study environment aligned to nursing, NP, and allied exams.
components.homeConversionSections.featur: Learn and test modes with spaced scheduling so weak concepts resurface before you forget them.
Full-length timed sessions with breakdowns that show whether timing, knowledge, or judgement slipped.
Strict mode · Score trends · Review queue
{{count}} items across domains with detailed rationales focused on judgement—not trivia recall.
Every option explains the clinical call—so you rehearse elimination logic, not pattern matching.
Pass-focused tools—not a generic content marketplace
Pick the lane that matches tonight’s study goal: drill items, rehearse a practice exam, or read rationales for what you just missed.
components.homeConversionSections.finalC: Start rehearsing with your pathway unlocked
Create a free account to browse starter content. Upgrade when you want the full bank, practice exams, and history for your tier—no surprise charges to look around.
components.homeConversionSections.howItW: How rationales, practice, and progress connect
Three loops you repeat until exam day—each one tied to how boards actually score judgement.
components.homeConversionSections.howSte: Short lessons and reviews organized by system and competency so you know why a presentation matters—not just the buzzword.
Timed and untimed sets, SATA, and case-style stems with rationales that dismantle every option—not just the letter the key lists.
See accuracy by domain, carry results into the next session, and stop guessing what to open after a 12-hour shift.
components.homeConversionSections.platfo: Les captures d'écran de la plateforme ne sont pas disponibles pour le moment. Veuillez réessayer plus tard.
Découvrez la plateforme en action
De l'analytique adaptative à l'entraînement type examen, explorez l'intérieur de NurseNest.
Aperçu de la plateforme
Des indications en temps réel sur la préparation aident à repérer les forces, les points faibles et les prochaines étapes.
Voyez exactement où vous en êtes
Des répartitions par domaine permettent de concentrer le temps d'étude là où c'est le plus utile.
Ciblez plus vite les points faibles
Questions réalistes de type examen (soins infirmiers), séries chronométrées et reprise détaillée des raisonnements.
Entraînement type examen
Le suivi intelligent des cartes aide à réviser les notions clés et à renforcer la mémoire.
Cartes mémoire à répétition espacée
Des études de cas interactives relient données patient, priorisation et prise de décision infirmière.
Renforcez le jugement clinique
Des vues comparatives montrent la progression entre les séances et les difficultés récurrentes.
Suivez l'amélioration dans le temps
Tendances de score, performance en centiles et résultats par catégorie.
Analyses détaillées de séance
Des plans hebdomadaires transforment les points faibles en étapes concrètes.
Plans d'étude personnalisés

components.homeDifferentiation.defaultSu: NurseNest is built for the judgement calls licensing exams measure: unsafe options, delegation limits, and the pathophysiology behind a symptom—not marketing checklists.
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.adap: Sessions react to what you just missed instead of feeding endless items you already nail—closer to how CAT-style exams probe weak domains.
Difficulty that tracks your miss patterns
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.clin: Each stem explains why the correct choice is safest and why the distractors fail—so you rehearse the same elimination logic the boards reward.
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.inte: Jump from a flagged topic into a lesson, then back into a timed block without exporting CSVs or juggling three subscriptions.
Questions, lessons, practice exams in one rail
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.mult: PN, RN, NP, and allied banks use the right delegation language and risk framing for that registration—not recycled stem banks with a new label.
components.homeDifferentiation.grid.read: See where accuracy wobbles by system or competency, then queue the next session against that bucket instead of guessing what to open tonight.
Category signals you can act on

Flashcards tied to what you actually miss
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide01.capt: Des items réalistes façon NCLEX avec des énoncés clairs, des choix de réponse et une interface pensée pour les révisions chronométrées.

components.homeHeroCarousel.slide04.capt: Suivez les performances par thème et difficulté pour savoir quoi revoir avant le jour J.

components.homeHeroCarousel.slide06.capt: Choisissez votre région et votre parcours d’examen pour que contenu, formulations et préparation restent alignés avec votre régulateur.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide07.capt: Découvrez comment les parcours RN, RPN/infirmier(e) auxiliaire et IP mènent aux bonnes banques, leçons et options.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide08.capt: Un seul espace pour kiné, ergothérapie, laboratoire et autres certifications paramédicales aux côtés des parcours infirmiers — mêmes habitudes, un compte.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide09.capt: Étudiez dans la langue et le contexte dont vous avez besoin, avec un contenu adapté aux cohortes internationales.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide10.capt: Votre point central pour les séries, les révisions dues et la suite entre leçons et questions.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide11.capt: Un parcours rapide de l’inscription à votre premier lot de pratique — peu de friction, plus de temps sur les questions.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide12.capt: Résumés de session et détails des scores pour voir forces, lacunes et tendances dans le temps.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide13.capt: Parcourez des modules structurés par système et par thème pour combler les lacunes entre les blocs de questions.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide14.capt: Mises en page lisibles sur téléphone et tablette pour les trajets et les pauses au chevet.
components.homeHeroCarousel.slide15.capt: Questions, leçons, cartes et analyses dans un même écosystème premium — sans jongler entre des dizaines d’onglets.

components.pathwayInventory.questionsPag: Signed-in practice uses your actual plan and region; counts here use this pathway's default tier as a reference.
components.pathwayInventory.tierNote: Counts reflect published items in the {{region}} region for the subscription tier tied to this pathway ({{shortName}}).
components.pathwayInventory.zeroPoolPart: No published questions match these filters yet. Routes stay open; use
components.trustSignals.builtFor: Built for nurses and nursing licensure exams
components.trustSignals.examHubIntro: Content targets clinical judgment for this licensure track and stays separated from unrelated specialties.
components.trustSignals.usageLine: Used by nursing students preparing across the United States and Canada.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.read: Adaptive pacing, timer budget, and item band for this pathway — pair with lessons and targeted drills before high-stakes runs.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.spec: Recommendations emphasize diagnostic reasoning, pharmacology safety, and advanced assessment depth for this board specialty.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.diag: Open mixed pathway questions to train differentials, red-flag recognition, and evidence-weighting under time pressure.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.phar: Prescribing-adjacent drills: mechanisms, monitoring, interactions, and deprescribing judgment scoped to your NP track.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.asse: Targeted exam elements that change pretest probability — history, focused exam, and interpretation before management jumps.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.inte: Telemetry, lab interpretation, branching cases, and station-style communication — linked into the same pathway entitlements you use in-app.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.repo: Momentum signals pair lesson progress with accuracy-style bands so you can see where confidence is still volatile.
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.diag: There is no standalone “diagnostic reasoning” URL; use mixed pathway questions (same deep link as NGN-style mixed practice).
components.examPathwayHub.npPremium.gues: Sign in to open in-app destinations with your pathway context preserved.
